◎简　　介  

　　Erik Toresen, widower and fishery observer, leads a quiet life in a small Norwegian town; but after the Nazi occupation, German abuses lead Erik to form a Resistance group. After a killing, Erik flees to the wilderness and finds a secret German air base; he resolves to escape to England with its location.

◎获奖情况  

　　第16届奥斯卡金像奖(1944)
　　剧情/喜剧片最佳配乐(提名) 路易斯·格伦伯格 / 莫里斯·斯托洛夫
introduction: Erik Toresen, widower and fishery observer, leads a quiet life in a small Norwegian town; but after the Nazi occupation, German abuses lead Erik to form a Resistance group. After a killing, Erik flees to the wilderness and finds a secret German air base; he resolves to escape to England with its location.
